channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Contact tracing could be key in halting the spread of hantavirus. Here's how it works
item.description: More than two dozen passengers left the cruise ship before the outbreak was identified. The race is on to connect with them to monitor their health — ...

item.title: As federal government pulls back, Colorado charts independent course with vaccines
item.description: As state leaders change laws to make vaccines more accessible, a coalition of doctors, public health advocates and everyday Coloradans is trying to st...

item.title: Canvas is back online, but questions — and final exam disruptions — linger
item.description: Some schools are warning users not to log back into Canvas yet, after a ransomware group claimed credit for a data breach. Half of North America's hig...

item.title: Court rejects Virginia redistricting in a blow to Democrats' counter to Trump, GOP
item.description: Virginia voters approved redistricting that could help Democrats pick up four House seats. Democrats said it was to counter the gains that Trump and t...
